context: Tests whether the agent writes a wrapper that always logs the four correlation fields, distinguishes publish.start / publish.ok / publish.error events, adds a status listener for connection-state events, and never logs the message payload.

checklist.name: publish.start logs channel + message_id + user_id
checklist.description: publishWithLogging emits a structured log event 'pubnub.publish.start' whose context object includes channel, message_id, and user_id (read from envelope.message_id and pubnub.getUserId())

checklist.name: publish.ok includes timetoken from response
checklist.description: publishWithLogging logs 'pubnub.publish.ok' AFTER the publish resolves, including the timetoken from the response (not from the envelope or start context)

checklist.name: publish.error log on failure
checklist.description: publishWithLogging logs 'pubnub.publish.error' with err.message in the catch block and rethrows

checklist.name: Receive log uses all four correlation fields
checklist.description: attachReceiveLogging's message handler logs an event whose context object includes channel, message_id (from e.message?.message_id), user_id (the receiver via pubnub.getUserId()), publisher_id (e.publisher), and timetoken (e.timetoken)

checklist.name: Receive process_error
checklist.description: When the wrapper's processFn throws, attachReceiveLogging logs 'pubnub.receive.process_error' with the same correlation context plus error: err.message

checklist.name: Status listener wired
checklist.description: attachStatusLogging registers a status: handler via pubnub.addListener (separate from the message listener)

checklist.name: Status log fields
checklist.description: Status listener logs at least category, operation, affectedChannels, lastTimetoken, and currentTimetoken from the status event

checklist.name: Structured logging only
checklist.description: Every log call is in the form log.info(event, ctx) or log.error(event, ctx) with a separate event-name string and a context object — no template strings or string concatenation that bakes data into the event string

checklist.name: No payload logging
checklist.description: Neither publishWithLogging nor attachReceiveLogging logs the entire envelope/message object (must not include envelope/message as a top-level context field)

checklist.name: ES module syntax
checklist.description: Uses import/export rather than CommonJS; imports log from './log.js'
